sizing_rule.note: Position Size = Account Equity / $5,062.71 per contract. Derived from optimal f calculation via cumulative probability distribution fitting (LOC=0.02, SCALE=2.76, SKEW=0, KURT=1.78) optimized against 232 historical trades. Base risk pct represents 1/$5,062.71 ≈ 0.0197% per contract unit.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing account equity by the optimal f value derived from fitting cumulative probability distributions to historical trade data.
